stories.headline: Trump administration pushes $250 bill with president's portrait on currency

perspectives.label: Independent
perspectives.body: Breaking news: Trump administration officials have pressed the Bureau of Engraving and Printing to design a $250 bill featuring the president’s portrait, in what would be the first appearance of a living person on U.S. currency in more than 150 years.

perspectives.label: Conservative
perspectives.body: 🚨 Could President Trump Appear on a $250 Bill? 💵🇺🇸 Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent says proposed legislation in Congress could pave the way for President Donald Trump to appear on a new $250 bill.

stories.headline: Anthropic raises $65B in Series H at $965B valuation.
stories.body:
We've raised $65 billion in Series H funding at a $965 billion post-money valuation, led by @AltimeterCap, Dragoneer, @Greenoaks, and @sequoia.

This investment will help us advance our research and expand our capacity to meet growing demand for Claude.

stories.headline: Dell stock surges 80% after Trump buy call and $9.7B Pentagon contract win
stories.body:
President Trump is undefeated in the stock market.

On May 8th, President Trump told everyone to "go out and buy a Dell."

19 days later, on May 27th, Dell was awarded a $9.7B contract with the US Pentagon.

Today, Dell, $DELL, reported stronger than expected earnings and the stock surged +30%.

Dell's stock is now up +80% since May 8th, adding +$120 BILLION in market cap.

Truly unprecedented.

stories.headline: Dell stock surges nearly 30% on stronger-than-expected AI-driven earnings
stories.body: BREAKING: Dell stock, $DELL, surges nearly +30% after reporting stronger than expected earnings due to AI.

stories.headline: NBA passes new anti-tanking rules expanding lottery and adding penalties
stories.body: Breaking: The NBA's Board of Governors has passed new anti-tanking rules that include expanding the draft lottery from 14 to 16 teams, a relegation zone where the bottom 3 teams get penalized with lessened chances for the No. 1 pick, and flattened odds, sources tell ESPN.

stories.headline: Julián Álvarez informs Atlético of desire to leave with Barcelona priority

Barça won’t stop here, planning for more signings after Gordon (done) and after talks for Álvarez (bid not sent yet, but soon).

stories.headline: Joe Rogan questions the reality of time in conversation with NASA astrophysicist.
stories.body:
New: Joe Rogan leaves NASA astrophysicist Michelle Thaller completely stuck after asking her a deep question about the reality of time:

ROGAN: “The weirdest thing that I’ve ever heard anybody say is that all time exists currently.”

THALLER: “That’s Albert Einstein.”

ROGAN: “When we measure time what exactly are we measuring? When we create a clock that runs 24 hours per day what is it measuring?”

THALLER: “That’s a deep question. That question caused everything in physics to fall apart.”

ROGAN: “I still don’t understand what we’re measuring.”

THALLER: “I don’t think I have an answer for you. I don’t think anybody does.”

stories.headline: Joe Rogan praises recent podcast conversation with NASA astrophysicist on space and time.
stories.body:
This was one of the most interesting conversations I’ve had in a while. 
 Michelle Thaller a wealth of fascinating information about space, time and all things the cosmos.  And she’s an incredibly compelling speaker.  These kinds of podcasts are some of my favorites

stories.headline: Clip of Joe Rogan discussing quantum entanglement and alien travel with NASA scientist.
stories.body:
Joe Rogan speechless after learning from NASA astrophysicist Michelle Thaller that aliens use “Quantum Entanglement” to travel instantaneously:

THALLER: “I don’t want your listeners to think I’m saying something stupid.”

ROGAN: “It’s not stupid. Quantum entanglement just means two things can be connected regardless of the physical distance apart.”

THALLER: “It’s real. Space and time don’t matter. Aliens would be able to respond to each other instantaneously because they’re entangled.”

ROGAN: “This is so bananas. So then what are humans entangled to?”

THALLER: “If humans all came from The Big Bang does that mean we’re connected to everything in the universe in some way?”

ROGAN: “You think this is how some super advanced intelligent life form would travel?”

THALLER: “It would make a lot more sense than using a spaceship."

stories.headline: Kewpie shares pork-wrapped thick fried tofu recipe
stories.body:
お手ごろ価格がうれしい厚揚げは、豚バラ巻きに😋甘辛だれでご飯が進む一品です！

【作り方】
6等分にした厚揚げに、半分に切った豚ばら肉を巻いて塩・こしょう、片栗粉をふる。フライパンにマヨネーズをひいてこんがりと焼く。火が通ったらみりん・しょうゆ・酒・砂糖を加えて照りが出るまで煮からめて完成。

stories.headline: User questions deep state opposition to General LaNeve nomination
stories.body:
I actually want to phone some friends on this General LaNeve drama.  I have a pretty firm rule: if the corporate mainstream media is united against someone, I am for them.

That’s where I’m at here.

But I’m curious @DataRepublican, what does the deep state have against this man?

And for @CynicalPublius @KurtSchlichter @RobManess, what does the military establishment have against him?

And for @MostlyPeaceful, what do our rank and file crazies think?

For @GenFlynn, your thoughts?

And @DC_Draino, you know more about the swamp than anyone. What’s happening here?

All of this negative press has me cheering for the man. And that position is only solidifying as the days go on.

So tell me… everyone else in internet land, what am I missing here?
